name: Voice Mute
description: Server mute a user in voice chat.
author: Kiodium

defaults.successMessage:
{targetMention} was voice muted in **{voiceChannel}** by {mention}.
Reason: {reason}
defaults.permissionMessage: You need Mute Members permission to voice mute users.
defaults.botPermissionMessage: I need Mute Members permission to voice mute users.
defaults.notInVoiceMessage: {targetMention} is not connected to a voice channel.
